component.name: Fleet Canvas
component.summary: Visual editor for Open-RMF robot fleet deployment sites

description.p: Fleet Canvas is a native Linux desktop editor for designing and validating Open-RMF robot fleet deployment sites. Draw multi-level buildings with navigation graphs, validate lane connectivity and clearance, preview MAPF scenarios, and export to Gazebo SDF with ROS 2 launch files.

ul.li: Multi-level building editor (walls, floors, doors, lifts)
Navigation graph editor with robot and human lane types
Nav graph validation: connectivity, clearance, reachability
MAPF scenario preview with heatmap and conflict detection
SDF and ROS 2 launch file export

description.p: First stable release. Includes nav graph validation, MAPF scenario preview, drawing UX tools, and full UX polish.
